decision: Use JWT session strategy (not database sessions) and embed orgId + role in the token
rationale: Avoids a sessions table; org context available server-side without a DB round-trip on every request

decision: Login form calls NextAuth signIn('credentials') directly, not a custom Server Action
rationale: NextAuth CredentialsProvider has its own CSRF-protected internal endpoint. A custom Server Action would bypass session management.

decision: Block demote/remove if org would be left with zero admins (COUNT check before write)
rationale: Prevents org lockout. Check is a SELECT COUNT before UPDATE/DELETE — not a constraint.
